rag_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes and implementation bindings in implementation scopes.
Use visible identifiers and case-provided thresholds when defining range assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by scoping AGREE contracts to the correct component or implementation.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type guarantees.
Ensure AGREE expression types match the expected types (bool, int, real).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are defined within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for assumptions and guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions unless they are exposed as typed ports or constants.
